title: ocotea contrerasii
intro: Ocotea contrerasii, also known as Mexican Prune, is a type of evergreen tree native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Lauraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ocotea contrerasii are attributed to its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. The tree can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
